videos.title: HTML5 Navigation Element Explained
videos.description: An overview of semantic HTML5 elements including the nav element and proper navigation structure.

videos.title: Responsive Navigation with CSS
videos.description: Kevin Powell shows how to create a responsive navigation menu with CSS, including hamburger menus.

videos.title: HTML Full Course — Semantic Elements
videos.description: Part of freeCodeCamp's complete HTML course covering semantic elements including nav.

videos.title: How to Create Accessible Navigation Menus
videos.description: Learn how to create navigation menus that are accessible to all users including screen reader users.
